title: Greatpractice Voice-Linter Rules (v0.1.0 placeholder)
description: Schema for voice-check.cjs regex rules. v0.1.0 = placeholder schema only (runtime not yet implemented). Canonical definition = Greatpractice.md §6.3. Used by both prose lint AND hook block-message lint (critic 3.2 — hook output also lint target).

pattern.description: regex pattern to detect blame/passive-idle/single-cause/hindsight framing

severity.description: v0.1 default = advisory (false positive > false negative safety). v0.2+ promote to recommended. v0.3+ select rules to mandatory.

suggestion.description: rewrite suggestion shown alongside the violation

intent_classifier.description: v0.2+ ML-based intent classification (regex → ML escalation path, critic 1.7)
